en-US.title: Ban-go: License Plate Lookup
en-US.subtitle: Number Plate & MOT Checker
en-US.description:
🚗 Know any car instantly — just from its plate.

Spotted a car on the road and want to know more? Ban-go turns any UK or US license plate into a full vehicle profile in seconds. No sign-up, no subscription, no fuss.

── WHAT YOU GET ──────────────────────────
✓ Make, model, year & registered colour
✓ Full MOT history with mileage timeline
✓ Fuel type, engine size & CO₂ emissions
✓ Estimated annual running costs
✓ Insurance group estimate
✓ Euro NCAP safety rating
✓ Used car listings near you
✓ US: NHTSA safety rating, EPA fuel economy & active recalls

── GREAT FOR ─────────────────────────────
• Checking a car before you buy it used
• Settling "what car is that?" debates instantly
• Verifying a vehicle matches the seller's claims
• Finding similar cars for sale near your location
• Researching running costs before committing to a purchase

── HOW IT WORKS ──────────────────────────
1. Enter the license plate number
2. Select your country (UK or US)
3. Get a full vehicle report — instantly

── DATA SOURCES ──────────────────────────
UK data is sourced directly from the DVSA (official MOT records) and DVLA, giving you accurate and up-to-date MOT history, mileage records, and vehicle details.

US data is sourced from NHTSA (safety ratings and recalls) and the EPA (fuel economy estimates).

Ban-go is the fastest way to look up any vehicle on the road. Whether you're a car enthusiast, a used car buyer, or just curious about that vehicle parked outside — Ban-go has the answer.
en-US.promoText: 🆕 MOT history charts, running costs & used car listings near you. Instantly decode any UK or US plate — make, model, safety rating & more.
